meta.title: Kichkintoy — the app that connects kindergarten and family
meta.description: Daily reports, attendance, photo albums, notices and payments — one app for parents, teachers and directors.

hero.title: Connecting kindergarten and family
hero.subtitle: Every day of your child at kindergarten — daily reports, attendance, photos, notices and payments in one app.

phone.todaySub: Your child's day, all in one place

roles.label: Parent, teacher and director — one design

mission.title: Every day matters
mission.body: Every parent wants to know how their child's day at kindergarten went. Every teacher wants to share it quickly, beautifully and without paperwork. Kichkintoy brings these two wishes together in one app — kindergarten life gets closer to the family.

values.title: Why Kichkintoy?
values.subtitle: Built to be easy for the kindergarten, the teacher and the family

free.title: Free for parents
free.description: Parents use the app without limits and completely free of charge.

devices.title: On phone and computer
devices.description: Mobile app and website — your data is the same everywhere.

languages.title: Works in 3 languages
languages.description: Uzbek, Russian and English — every family picks the language they prefer.

payments.title: Secure payments
payments.description: Tuition is paid securely through Payme and Click.

features.title: Kindergarten life — in one app
features.subtitle: Kichkintoy covers all the daily work of a kindergarten

reports.title: Daily reports
reports.description: The teacher writes every day about the child's meals, naps and mood.
reports.more: Each report holds mood, meals, nap time and photos. Teachers can draft the text with the AI assistant, and parents reply with comments.

albums.title: Photo albums
albums.description: Photos from holidays and activities go straight to the parents.
albums.more: Teachers upload photos by class in bulk. Parents get a notification and see every new photo of their child on the home feed.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.description: Check-in and check-out take one tap, and parents know right away.
attendance.more: Check-in and check-out take one tap. Parents instantly see the time, and the director sees attendance statistics for every class.

calendar.title: Calendar and notices
calendar.description: Holidays, meetings and important news — nothing gets lost.
calendar.more: Holidays, parent meetings and events live in one calendar — the nearest ones are always shown on the home screen.

meals.title: Meal menu
meals.description: The weekly menu is published in advance — you know what's for lunch today.
meals.more: The kitchen publishes the weekly menu in advance — breakfast, lunch and snacks for every day of the week.

medications.title: Medications and pickup
medications.description: Medication and pickup requests are submitted officially in the app.
medications.more: Parents send an official request with the dose and time. The teacher confirms it in the app — nothing is passed by word of mouth.

chat.title: Chat and AI assistant
chat.description: Message the teacher or ask the AI assistant about the kindergarten.
chat.more: Message the teacher directly, or ask the AI chatroom — it answers parents, teachers and directors from the kindergarten's real data.

documents.title: Documents
documents.description: Applications and documents are filled in and submitted online, paper-free.
documents.more: Admission applications and certificates are submitted online, reviewed by the teacher or director, and their status is always visible.

chat.kicker: Ask anything about your child's day —
chat.title: AI chat for every role
chat.body: Kichkintoy has a built-in AI assistant in the chatroom — for parents, teachers and directors. It answers from the kindergarten's real data: reports, attendance, albums and payments.
bullets: Parents ask "How was Omina's day?" — the AI replies with the report, meals and photos
Teachers draft daily reports and answers with AI help
Directors get quick summaries about classes, staff and payments

reports.title: Daily reports
reports.body: The teacher records mood, meals, naps and photos every day. Parents open the app in the evening and relive the whole day.
bullets: Mood, meals and nap in one card
Photos attached right in the report

screen.title: Omina had a calm, happy day
screen.note: Slept well after lunch and joined the music circle.

attendance.title: Attendance parents trust
attendance.body: The teacher marks attendance in one tap and parents see the time right away. The monthly calendar and statistics are always at hand.
bullets: Parents see the arrival time instantly
Monthly calendar and statistics for the director

albums.title: Photo albums
albums.body: Teachers upload photos from activities and holidays. Parents see their child's photos and leave comments.

documents.title: Documents online
documents.body: Admission documents are collected in the app: submitting, reviewing and approving all happen online, and the status is always visible.
bullets: Teacher and director review with one tap
Status always visible: submitted, in review, approved

ai.title: AI assistant
ai.description: Chatroom AI for parents, teachers and directors — answers from real data.
